text:
Created attachment 181777
sysutils/cbsd: update to 11.0.15

update to 11.0.15

bhyve: add Ubuntu 17.04 profile
srcup: add HardenedBSD source repository support
jail: ability to change mac address for vnet-based jail. Issue #159
initenv: add RACCT enable question in first initenv wizard, Issue #138
